title: Access Collection
description: A collection of AIPs that is defined by a Collection Description but for which there is no Packaging Information for the collection in Archival Storage.

definitions.definition: A collection of AIPs that is defined by a Collection Description but for which there is no Packaging Information for the collection in Archival Storage.
definitions.sources:
- [Reference Model for an Open Archival Information System (OAIS), Recommended Practice CCSDS 650.0-M-2, Magenta Book 2012](https://public.ccsds.org/pubs/650x0m2.pdf)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
